name: The Approach

setup.description: Pick a green with a visible flag and play from your tier's distance: 100 yards (High), 125 yards (Mid), 150 yards (Low), or 165 yards (Scratch+). Hit 10 approach shots at the pin.

rules.description: Play 3 full rounds of 10 approach shots from your tier's distance — record your best round. Each ball is judged on where it finishes, not how it looked getting there.
scoring: 1 point per ball that finishes on the green
Play 3 rounds of 10 balls; your best round counts

caption: Same swing, different number for every tier. Best of 3 rounds — how many found the green? #golfable #golftok #golfpractice #loweryourhandicap
